label: Meet the Garden Brain — schedules that learn from your soil
items: Rhozly now learns how YOUR beds actually behave. Every night it compares your soil sensors' measured drying speed against your plants' comfort range and your watering routines — and suggests precise changes: "Raised Bed A dries faster than your every-4-days schedule — change to every 2?"
One tap applies the change. A week later Rhozly checks the sensor again and tells you honestly whether it worked — "✓ Since the change: soil in range 93% of the time."
Beds with plants but no watering routine get one proposed from the measured data — and hot weeks use your bed's measured hot-weather drying speed, not a guess.

It's careful: suggestions only appear once a sensor has ~2 weeks of confident data, never repeat within a fortnight of a dismissal, and your valve automations are respected. Every suggestion shows its numbers.
Available on Sage and Evergreen for homes with a soil sensor. Find suggestions on your dashboard; notifications can be tuned under Head Gardener → Notifications.
